title: iPhone SE 4 to Have Notch Instead of Dynamic Island
content:
The upcoming iPhone SE 4 will feature a notch instead of the Dynamic Island, respected display analyst Ross Young said today. The device will have a "notch like the iPhone 14," according to Young, which contradicts a recent leak that depicted a ‚ÄåDynamic Island‚Äå.


Earlier this month, leaker Evan Blass shared images said to feature the ‚ÄåiPhone SE‚Äå 4's design, but those images featured an iPhone with a ‚ÄåDynamic Island‚Äå rather than the notch that had been previously rumored for new low-cost ‚ÄåiPhone‚Äå. A sketchy leak from February 2024 also suggested that the ‚ÄåiPhone SE‚Äå 4 would get the ‚ÄåDynamic Island‚Äå, but most other information has suggested that Apple will go with the notch design.

Multiple rumors have indicated that the ‚ÄåiPhone SE‚Äå 4 is modeled after the ‚ÄåiPhone 14‚Äå, and will therefore have an ‚ÄåiPhone‚Äå 14-style design. The ‚ÄåiPhone 14‚Äå had a notch and not a ‚ÄåDynamic Island‚Äå, so the notch makes more sense if Apple is using an ‚ÄåiPhone 14‚Äå body for the ‚ÄåiPhone SE‚Äå 4.

With the launch of the ‚ÄåiPhone SE‚Äå 4, Apple will sunset Touch ID in the ‚ÄåiPhone‚Äå lineup, and all iPhones will have Face ID. The ‚ÄåiPhone SE‚Äå 4 is also expected to feature a 6.1-inch display, a single-lens rear camera, 8GB RAM, and an A17 Pro chip capable of supporting Apple Intelligence.

Current rumors suggest that the ‚ÄåiPhone SE‚Äå 4 will be introduced in the spring, likely in April.
